name: Xtreme Club Racing
short_description: Get behind the wheel in one of the most frenetic extreme driving games. Various interactive elements such as hurricanes, lava balls, giant spinning tops, which will cross in the middle of the competition track and will put your reflexes and extreme driving to the limit.
detailed_description:
Increase your experience by winning various stages and you will have access to new vehicles. Get coins for each victory and with them you can buy Nitros (turbos), resistance and maneuverability, elements with which you can improve your vehicles.

Jumps, chicanes, dizzying speeds, slopes, skids and very aggressive and challenging competitors are part of what ‘Xtreme Club Racing’ has to offer. Don’t miss it... good luck!!!

• Pure arcade-style gameplay in different locations.

• Train in a simulator and pass the tests to access the best club of drivers in extreme competition.

• Vehicles with different characteristics and with various mechanical improvements.

• Replayability! Get the 3 stars of each circuit.

• Each race feels different with procedurally generated levels.
